components.value: V, F (a square of cloth and a needle) EFFECTS

spell_resistance.value: This bonus doesn’t increase any other effects that depend on caster level , such as the spell’s damage or range, and affects only the first spell cast after sure casting. description.value: You gain temporary insight into your enemies’ magical defenses. When you next cast a spell before the end of the next round, treat your caster level as 5 higher than normal for the purpose of overcoming
